payload.answer: I can’t safely store this preference durably because the people/option referred to by “he” and “the other one” aren’t identified.

entity_resolution.reason: The referent for 'he' and what 'the other one' refers to are not specified, so this cannot be safely and durably stored.

memory_cards.statement: The user indicates that 'he' prefers the other one (exact referent of 'the other one' is unspecified).

details: Rewrite requested, but durable memory commit blocked due to ambiguous referents.

repair_options: Specify who “he” is (name or unique identifier).
Specify what “the other one” is (e.g., “the redesigned modal,” “Option B,” a product name, or the items being compared).
Provide the full context of the rewrite (what it is replacing) so the memory update can be applied correctly.
